title: Vay Arkadas
overview: One of the three friends living in the slums of Istanbul Manik, Tik and Dildo's, many ordinary overflow out of the neighborhood, but the excitement continued in a lively way in themselves, the stories of adventure full of life and laughter.

trailers.title: "Vay Arkadaş - Manik, Tik, Dildo" Orijinal Fragman SD
